tracks.meaning: a qualification awarded by a college or university upon completion of a course of study
a unit of angle equal to 1/360th of a circle, denoted by the symbol °
the extent to which something turns or rotates, measured as an angle
the severity level of a criminal offense, such as first degree murder or second degree assault
the extent or amount of something, as in 'to some degree' or 'to a high degree'
a step or stage in a scale or hierarchy of rank, status, or achievement
a step in the line of descent or relationship between relatives
a unit expressing the intensity or severity of heat or cold
